title: caladenia cuneata
intro: Caladenia cuneata, also known as the narrow petal spider orchid, is a species of orchid native to Western Australia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Aboriginal medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The leaves and roots of Caladenia cuneata are used to make herbal preparations, which are said to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. However, more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using Caladenia cuneata for medicinal purposes.
